Ascension Guide

NRG: Energy used to play cards. Refills each turn.

Ward: Ward absorbs damage before HP.

Diamond Nodes: Risk/reward events with real choices.

Map Paths: You can only move along connected branches.

Targeting: Click a living enemy to select who single-target cards will hit.

Vanguard: Starts each battle with 8 Ward.

Arcanist: The first Skill you play each turn costs 1 less.

Plagueblade: When hit, poisons the attacker.

Current Deck

Settings

These options only change presentation and saving behavior. Combat, cards, relics, and balance stay the same.

Auto Save

Automatically save your run when you move, fight, shop, or change screens.

Card Hover Zoom

Turn the large card zoom effect on or off.

Sound Effects

Play simple battle, menu, and reward sound effects.
